series_metadata.series_description: Hazardous and non-hazardous chemical lists and logs including DRC 1896 - Non-Hazardous Chemical Inventory Log, DRC 1886-Hazardous Chemical Log, DRC 1895- Chemical List, and the Facility List of Hazardous Chemicals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years (current audit cycle), then destroy., Paper: Shred
